channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 2nd April
item.description:
Perm repair for 2hr pothole around cover 900x300x200mm Road closure Stats (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple holes around roundabout 3 serious. This is getting progressively worse and us now causing a major hazard and needs addressing immediately., 2nd April
item.description:
The roundabout at junction of Station Rd/Parton Rd/Bader Ave outside Parish Council Offices.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs and sandbags left behind, 2nd April
item.description:
The 'triangle' at the junction of School Road and Station Road was repaired three weeks ago. Signs and sandbags still litter the site.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, School Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 2nd April
item.description:
diseased tree
Report on FixMyStreet
